name: MultiWAVE
description: Eight-channel dual wavetable oscillator for the N.U.S.S. Each channel has two independent wavetable oscillators (Osc A and Osc B) with Spread and Modulation Dissemination for per-channel parameter variation.

controls.name: Span
controls.description: Sets the Channel Span for Activation. Selects channel in Index mode, step size in Round mode, clock divisions in Parallel mode.
controls.detail: Modes: Channel Index (White), Round (Yellow), Parallel (Cyan), Shift Register (Magenta)

controls.name: Span CV Input attenuverter
controls.description: Bipolar attenuator for Span CV Input. Set CW in Channel Index to translate Channel Index messages from N.U.S.S. modules.

controls.name: Mode Button
controls.description: Selects Span Mode. Long press = MIDI panic. On Page 2 long press enables/disables MPE.

controls.name: Spread Combo Pot
controls.description: Bipolar panel control for Spread parameter. Sets direction and amount of modulation sent to unpatched Spreadable parameters.
controls.detail: Bipolar · When Spread CV patched: operates as attenuverter

controls.name: Osc A Wave Panel Control
controls.description: Sets wave position in currently loaded wavetable. Spreadable parameter.

controls.name: Osc A Wave Attenuverter
controls.description: Bi-polar attenuator for A-Wave Modulation Dissemination or Spread amount.

controls.name: Osc A Pitch Panel Control
controls.description: Sets starting Pitch for Osc A according to selected Follow mode.
controls.detail: Follow modes: Off (free), Pink (expo detune), Magenta (linear detune), Cyan (octaves), Green (integer multiply)

controls.name: Osc A Pitch Attenuverter
controls.description: Bi-polar attenuator for Pitch Modulation Dissemination or Spread. Set full CW for 1v/oct response.

controls.name: Mod Shape Button (Osc A)
controls.description: Selects and denotes Mod Shape for Osc A. Press and hold to reset to OFF.

controls.name: Follow Button
controls.description: Selects and denotes Follow Mode for Osc A relative to Osc B pitch.
controls.detail: Off=Free · Pink=Expo Detune · Magenta=Linear Detune · Cyan=Octaves · Green=Integer Multiply

controls.name: Osc B Pitch Panel Control
controls.description: Sets starting Pitch for Osc B (coarse). Sums with Fine, TRPS and V/Oct input plus Glide.

controls.name: Osc B Pitch Fine Tune
controls.description: Fine control of starting Pitch for Osc B.

controls.name: Osc B Glide Panel Control
controls.description: Sets Glide (portamento) time at 1v/oct input upon each new Activation.

controls.name: Osc B Wave Panel Control
controls.description: Sets wave position in currently loaded wavetable for Osc B. Spreadable parameter.

controls.name: Osc B Wave Attenuverter
controls.description: Bi-polar attenuator for B-Wave Modulation Dissemination or Spread amount.

controls.name: Mod Shape Button (Osc B)
controls.description: Selects Mod Shape for Osc B. On Page 2, selects Multimod Activation Behavior.

controls.name: Mod Time Panel Control
controls.description: Sets the rate of read modulation through wavetable. Spreadable parameter.
controls.detail: Slow to fast · Gold legend = Spreadable

controls.name: Mod Time Attenuverter
controls.description: Bi-polar attenuator for Mod Time Modulation Dissemination or Spread amount.

controls.name: Blend CV Input
controls.description: Control voltage input for Blend. Live input (not subject to Modulation Dissemination).
controls.detail: Sets mix between Osc A and Osc B

controls.name: Blend Panel Control
controls.description: Sets output mix between Osc A and Osc B.
controls.detail: CCW=Osc A only · CW=Osc B only

controls.name: Detune Panel Control
controls.description: Detunes all eight channels of Osc B. CCW=in tune; full CW=harmonic oscillator.

controls.name: Page 2 Button
controls.description: Press to enter Page 2 for wavetable selection, output mixing, Multimod and quantization settings.
controls.detail: Activity Window lights White when active

inputs.name: Activate
inputs.description: Gate input. Rising edge activates channels per Span and Mode.

inputs.name: Accumulate
inputs.description: Gate input. Holds Activation messages until gate received; channels display Orange.

inputs.name: Reset
inputs.description: Gate input. Resets MultiWAVE per current Span Mode.

inputs.name: Span CV
inputs.description: CV input for Span parameter. Modulate or patch Channel Index from another N.U.S.S. module.

inputs.name: A-Wave CV
inputs.description: CV input for Osc A wave position. Switches to Modulation Dissemination when patched.

inputs.name: Pitch Exponential (Osc A)
inputs.description: 1V/oct pitch input for Osc A. Modulation Dissemination when patched.

inputs.name: TRPS (Transpose)
inputs.description: Live 1V/oct global transpose input for all 8 channels of Osc B. Affects all channels simultaneously.

inputs.name: V/Oct (Osc B)
inputs.description: Modulation Dissemination input for Osc B pitch. Tracks 1V/oct.

inputs.name: B-Wave CV
inputs.description: CV input for Osc B wave position. Switches to Modulation Dissemination when patched.

inputs.name: Mod Time CV
inputs.description: CV input for Mod Time. Switches to Modulation Dissemination when patched.

inputs.name: Blend CV
inputs.description: Live CV input for Blend between Osc A and Osc B.

outputs.name: Channel 1–8 Outputs
outputs.description: Individual waveform outputs for each MultiWAVE channel. In Page 2 mixing mode, outputs 5-8 carry submixes.

outputs.name: Channel Index Out
outputs.description: CV indicating currently Activated channel (0.5V/channel). Patch to Span CV of another N.U.S.S. module.

behaviors.name: Channel Index Mode
behaviors.description: SPAN selects channel to Activate. Turn knob or send sequence to Activate channels in any order. Works with N.U.S.S. Channel Index output for module-to-module communication.

behaviors.name: Round Mode
behaviors.description: Each trigger advances activation by Span channels. Span=1 means all 8 channels round-robin one at a time. Reset returns to Channel 1.

behaviors.name: Parallel Mode
behaviors.description: Each channel activates at a clock division of the incoming trigger. Divisions are set by Span. Reset resets all clock division counters.

behaviors.name: Shift Register Mode
behaviors.description: On each Activation, Modulation Dissemination values shift from the selected channel forward. Creates cascading arpeggio effects.

behaviors.name: Spread Modulation
behaviors.description: Distributes modulation across 8 channels in differing amounts to unpatched Spreadable parameters (Osc A Wave, Osc B Wave, Mod Time, Osc A Pitch) simultaneously from a single control. Up to 40 destinations weighted by the Spread direction.

behaviors.name: Output Mixing (Page 2)
behaviors.description: Mode button toggles output mixing. Outputs: 1-4=individual, 5=Osc A mono mix, 6=Osc B mono mix, 7=odd channels, 8=even channels.

patchIdeas.name: 8-voice polyphony with PoliMATHS
patchIdeas.patch: Uses the N.U.S.S. header chain: PoliMATHS selects a channel on MultiWAVE while its own envelope outputs gate that voice's level on QXG.
steps: Press MODE on MultiWAVE until the Span Activity Window is WHITE (Channel Index mode).
Set SPAN knob to 12:00 and SPAN CV attenuverter fully clockwise (translates Channel Index voltages 1:1).
Connect PoliMATHS CHANNEL INDEX OUT into MultiWAVE SPAN CV input.
Patch keyboard/MIDI 1V/oct into MultiWAVE TRPS — this transposes all 8 voices of Osc B at once.
Set BLEND around noon so both Osc A and Osc B are audible per channel.
Connect the MultiWAVE rear header ribbon to the QXG signal header (channels 1–8 become QXG signal ins 1–8).
Connect the PoliMATHS rear header ribbon to the QXG control header (envelopes 1–8 become QXG VCA CVs 1–8).
Play keys — PoliMATHS steals a voice per note, gates it through QXG, and MultiWAVE voices the pitch.
patchIdeas.signalOut: QXG main out — full 8-voice polyphonic voice-card, envelope-shaped.
patchIdeas.hear: A polysynth where every note steals the next free voice. Raise DETUNE slightly for analog chorus, or sweep SPREAD for per-voice timbral drift.
patchIdeas.diagram:
MULTIWAVE:
* Mode: Channel Index
* Span: noon
* Span CV atten: full CW
* Blend: noon
- PoliMATHS (Channel Index Output) >> MultiWAVE (Span CV) // selects voice
- MIDI/Keys (Pitch) p> MultiWAVE (TRPS) // global 1V/oct
- MultiWAVE (Channel 1–8 Outputs) -> QXG (Signal Inputs 1–4) // via N.U.S.S. header
- PoliMATHS (Channel Outputs 1–8) >> QXG (Control Inputs 1–4) // via N.U.S.S. header

patchIdeas.name: Harmonic oscillator drone
patchIdeas.patch: DETUNE fully CW stretches the 8 voices into a harmonic series instead of chorus — sequence TRPS to transpose the whole stack.
steps: Turn DETUNE fully clockwise — Osc B on each channel now sits on a different integer harmonic of the root.
Set BLEND at noon so both oscillator banks are heard.
Set Osc A FOLLOW to GREEN (Integer Multiply) so Osc A also locks to musical ratios of Osc B.
Patch a slow sequencer CV into MultiWAVE TRPS (the 1V/oct global transpose).
Leave Activate, Accumulate, Reset unpatched so all eight channels stay on continuously.
Sum channel outputs 1–8 into a mixer — or press PAGE 2 + MODE (Span LED green) and take OUT 5 (Osc A mono mix) + OUT 6 (Osc B mono mix).
Slowly turn DETUNE back CCW and hear the harmonic stack collapse into unison chorus.
patchIdeas.signalOut: Summed channel outs 1–8 (or Page 2 mono mixes on 5/6) — a rich additive harmonic tone.
patchIdeas.hear: A pipe-organ/harmonica-like drone where each voice is a tuned partial. Transposing TRPS moves the whole harmonic series together; DETUNE CCW morphs it back toward a detuned unison pad.
patchIdeas.diagram:
MULTIWAVE:
* Detune: Full CW
* Blend: noon
* Follow (Osc A): Green (Integer Multiply)
- Sequencer (CV Out) p> MultiWAVE (TRPS) // transpose harmonic series
- MultiWAVE (Channel 1–8 Outputs) -> Mixer (In)

patchIdeas.name: Drifting polyphonic pad with Spread
patchIdeas.patch: Round mode cycles voices from a single clock; a slow LFO into SPREAD CV distributes modulation unevenly across the 8 channels.
steps: Press MODE until the Span Activity Window is YELLOW (Round mode).
Set SPAN to 1 so each incoming trigger advances by one channel (simple round-robin).
Set BLEND at noon and MOD TIME slow (CCW of noon).
Pick a wavetable on Page 2 — PURPLE (Additive) or ORANGE (Organs) works well for pads.
Patch a slow clock (~1–4 Hz) into ACTIVATE — each tick lights the next channel.
Patch a slow LFO (~0.1 Hz) into SPREAD CV; set the SPREAD COMBO POT to act as attenuverter around noon.
Sum channel outputs 1–8 into a mixer.
Tweak the GOLD-legend attenuverters (A-WAVE, B-WAVE, MOD TIME, OSC A PITCH) to pick which parameters the Spread modulation reaches.
patchIdeas.signalOut: Summed channel outs 1–8 — an 8-voice evolving pad.
patchIdeas.hear: A lush chorused pad where each of the 8 voices slowly drifts through its wavetable at a different rate. Raise SPREAD depth for more divergence between voices.
patchIdeas.diagram:
MULTIWAVE:
* Mode: Round
* Span: 1
* Blend: noon
* Mod Time: slow
- Clock (Trig) g> MultiWAVE (Activate) // round-robin voices
- LFO (Out) >> MultiWAVE (Spread CV) // drift across channels
- MultiWAVE (Channel 1–8 Outputs) -> Mixer (In)

patchIdeas.name: Parallel-clock rhythmic wavetable
patchIdeas.patch: Parallel mode fires each channel at its own clock division of a master clock — turning MultiWAVE into an 8-voice rhythm generator.
steps: Press MODE until the Span Activity Window is CYAN (Parallel mode).
Set SPAN near 12:00 first (all channels on /1), then slowly turn it CCW to spread out divisions (Ch1 gets the largest, Ch8 the smallest).
Patch a steady clock (16th-notes works well) into ACTIVATE.
Patch the same clock into RESET every 1–2 bars so divisions stay phase-locked.
Set BLEND at noon; pick a percussive wavetable on Page 2 (BLUE Make Noise or PINK Sync).
Set OSC B PITCH to taste and turn DETUNE slightly CW for motion between voices.
Take channel outs 1–8 into 8 separate mixer channels — or Page 2 outs 7 (odd) and 8 (even) for a stereo split.
Nudge SPAN to re-map which channel plays which division.
patchIdeas.signalOut: Individual channel outs 1–8, or Page 2 odd/even sub-mixes on outs 7 & 8.
patchIdeas.hear: An 8-voice polyrhythm where each voice fires at a different clock division. Great for generative sequences and Reichian phasing.
patchIdeas.diagram:
MULTIWAVE:
* Mode: Parallel
* Span: ~11 o'clock
* Blend: noon
- Clock (Trig) g> MultiWAVE (Activate)
- Clock /16 (Trig) g> MultiWAVE (Reset) // realign divisions
- MultiWAVE (Channel 1–8 Outputs) -> Mixer (Ins 1–8)

patchIdeas.name: Shift-register cascading arpeggio
patchIdeas.patch: Shift Register mode passes Modulation Dissemination values down the voice array each Activation, creating cascading timbral arpeggios.
steps: Press MODE until the Span Activity Window is MAGENTA (Shift Register mode).
Set SPAN clockwise to Channel 4 — shift register will run from Ch4 forward to Ch8.
Patch a sequencer's CV out into OSC B V/OCT input — this CV seeds the shift register on each Activation.
Patch a clock into ACTIVATE. Every trigger loads the current V/Oct into Ch4 and shifts old values down to Ch5/6/7/8.
Set BLEND at noon. Turn OSC B WAVE attenuverter CW so wave position also shifts down the line.
Optional: patch Reset occasionally to clear the register.
Sum channel outputs 1–8 into a mixer — Ch1–3 hold static notes, Ch4–8 replay the last 5 sequencer notes in cascade.
patchIdeas.signalOut: Summed channel outs 1–8 — a static chord (Ch1–3) under a rippling 5-note echo (Ch4–8).
patchIdeas.hear: A shimmering 'delay-line of pitches': each new sequencer note pushes older notes further down the voice array and they slowly fade out.
patchIdeas.diagram:
MULTIWAVE:
* Mode: Shift Register
* Span: CW to Ch4
* Blend: noon
- Sequencer (CV) p> MultiWAVE (V/Oct Osc B) // seeds register
- Clock (Trig) g> MultiWAVE (Activate) // shifts register
- MultiWAVE (Channel 1–8 Outputs) -> Mixer (In)

patchIdeas.name: Accumulate swelling chord
patchIdeas.patch: Stack multiple Activations in the Accumulate buffer, then trigger them all at once for a synchronized chord hit with overlapping Mod-Time motion.
steps: Press MODE until the Span Activity Window is YELLOW (Round mode) and set SPAN to 1.
Patch a note-rate trigger (e.g. keyboard gate) into ACTIVATE — each press stages a channel (it lights ORANGE, not played yet).
Patch a slower clock (1/bar) into ACCUMULATE — on its tick all staged channels Activate together.
Set BLEND at noon and MOD TIME slow.
Turn DETUNE ~10 o'clock for analog-poly chorus.
On Page 2 enable Quantization (Follow button → YELLOW) so all pitches lock to 12-TET, A=440.
Sum channel outputs 1–8 into a mixer (or use Page 2 out 5/6 Osc A/B mixes).
patchIdeas.signalOut: Summed channel outs 1–8 — a chord hit that rearticulates on every ACCUMULATE gate.
patchIdeas.hear: Each pressed key stages a voice (orange LED); on every bar the chord recalls with all new notes at once, like stacking a sampler's poly hold.
patchIdeas.diagram:
MULTIWAVE:
* Mode: Round
* Span: 1
* Detune: ~10 o'clock
* Page 2 Quantize: Yellow (on)
- Keys (Gate) g> MultiWAVE (Activate) // stage voice
- Clock /bar (Trig) g> MultiWAVE (Accumulate) // release chord
- Keys (Pitch) p> MultiWAVE (TRPS)
- MultiWAVE (Channel 1–8 Outputs) -> Mixer (In)
